//: Phase 2 security rules — DO NOT deploy until Phase 1 (anonymous auth in firebaseConfig.ts) is live AND the Anonymous provider is enabled in the Firebase Console, otherwise the whole app loses DB access. Deploy with: firebase deploy --only database
//2: WARNING: this only blocks unauthenticated REST. The custom login still reads /users (with plaintext passwords) client-side, so any signed-in (even anonymous) client can read them. Fixing that requires Phase 3 (real Firebase Auth + server-side login + password hashing).
